notes: First A1 re-run with EEGNet input_scale=1e6 (volts -> microvolts) fix in models/eegnet.py. EEGNet now learns the cross-subject task at task_acc=0.388 (>chance 0.25) and leaks subject identity at logreg top-1 0.411 (chance 0.0096; 43x lift). FBCSP and Riemann re-ID numbers reproduce the prior run within bootstrap CI, validating that the EEGNet rerun did not perturb their entries.
